name: Will de Vries
description:
Will had just been the decoy for another successful heist, and with luck favouring him once more he managed to get onto a carriage and ride off. How was he supposed to know there was a passenger already inside? Thank you for letting me be part of the collaboration, guys.

𝕻𝖆𝖗𝖙 𝖔𝖋 𝕷𝖔𝖘 𝕯𝖊𝖘𝖌𝖗𝖆𝖈𝖎𝖆𝖉𝖔𝖘 𝕮𝖔𝖜𝖇𝖔𝖞 𝕮𝖔𝖑𝖑𝖆𝖇𝖔𝖗𝖆𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓
creator: Kimaii
